headline: Jensen Huang Joins Elite Tsinghua University Advisory Board That Includes Tim Cook And Elon Musk: Report
summary: Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang has reportedly agreed to join the advisory board of one of China's most prestigious universities. Nvidia CEO Joins Elite Tsinghua Advisory Board Huang accepted an invitation to join the advisory board of Tsinghua University School of Economics and Management, the Financial Times reported on Wednesday, citing people familiar with the matter. The board includes some of the world's most prominent business leaders. It has Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) CEO Tim C
